data.title: Filecoin (FIL) price tests critical $2.52 support after dropping 1.06% from $2.62, creating uncertainty for traders.
data.description: The price of FIL has decreased to $2.52, showing a 1.06% decline following the breach of the crucial $2.62 support level. Traders are facing uncertainty due to conflicting technical indicators, making it challenging to predict the upcoming market trend.

data.title: Macquarie Asset Management closes $3B Green Energy Transition Solutions Fund, aiming to invest in decarbonising energy sectors.
data.description: Macquarie Asset Management has successfully completed the final close of the Macquarie Green Energy Transition Solutions Fund, with an impressive total of over $3 billion in commitments, including both the Fund and co-investments. This remarkable milestone marks Macquarie's inaugural energy transition fund, aiming to explore opportunities beyond traditional renewable energy sources. The Fund's primary focus is on investing in companies that utilize established technologies and infrastructure to facilitate the decarbonization of various energy sectors.

data.title: Celestia (TIA) at $1.78 (-1.49% daily) post 18% weekly surge, testing vital support at $1.50. Consolidation phase ongoing.
data.description: The stock of TIA is currently priced at $1.78, which represents a decrease of 1.49% for the day. It saw a notable increase of 18% over the course of this week. Analysis of technical indicators suggests that the stock is in a consolidation phase, with a key support level at $1.50 currently under scrutiny.

data.title: Bank of Canada cautions about stablecoin growth, stresses need for regulations to avoid lagging as adoption surges.
data.description: The Bank of Canada has cautioned that Canada could lose ground without federal regulation of stablecoins, as their use within the country is rapidly increasing. The bank highlighted the importance of implementing regulations to keep pace with the growing adoption of stablecoins domestically.

data.title: Perpetua Resources granted permission by U.S. Forest Service to start project development construction; early works to begin this fall.
data.description: The U.S. Forest Service has given the green light to begin initial construction after meeting the requirements of the Record of Decision. This Notice to Proceed allows for the commencement of the early works project, with construction projected to start this autumn pending the placement of financial assurance. The announcement was made in Boise, Idaho on September 19, 2025.

data.title: AAVE stays steady at $307 amid governance changes; emission cuts proposed as technical signals remain neutral at $307.89.
data.description: The current price of AAVE stands at $307.89, displaying conflicting signals as the governance suggests reducing emissions. Meanwhile, technical indicators reflect a neutral momentum, indicating a period of consolidation.

data.title: DarwinCell presents MSC-based drug ALT001 at ANA 2025 Annual Meeting in Baltimore, with global experts and scholars attending.
data.description: From September 13 to 16, 2025, Baltimore hosted the 150th American Neurological Association Annual Meeting (ANA 2025). The event gathered top experts, scholars, and industry leaders in the neurological field from around the world.
